answer:
The real exchange rate adjusts the nominal rate for price level changes. It is calculated as:  
\[
\text{Real rate} = \text{Nominal rate} \times \frac{P_{\text{US}}}{P_{\text{Indonesia}}} = 14{,}000 \times \frac{110}{105} \approx 14{,}666.67.
\]  
Thus, the correct answer is F.  

\boxed{F}
